enquiry.title: Enquiry
enquiry.description: A property document service enquiry from a potential client.

fullName.description: The full name of the person making the enquiry.

phone.description: The 10-digit phone number of the person.

email.description: The email address of the person.

service.description: The type of service requested (e.g., khata, e-khata).

area.description: The society or area in Bengaluru where the property is located.

message.description: Additional details or questions from the client.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the enquiry was submitted.

status.description: The current status of the enquiry.
